zh.of Gloucestershire, Worcestershire, and: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de la Mare於大約1130年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親William de la Mare28歲，母親Amabel de Dicton33歲。他與Cressie de Malherbe結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1203年在他的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.of Gloucestershire, Worcestershire, and: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de la Mare于大约1130年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲William de la Mare28岁，母亲Amabel de Dicton33岁。他与Cressie de Malherbe结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1203年在他的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Mare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Americo, Cesareo, Fernando, Ines, Javier, Jose, Marcos.  Portuguese Henrique.  Italian Antonio, Gino, Olindo, Silvio, Vito.  Dutch Andries.
Italian: topographic name for someone living by the sea, from mare ‘sea’.
English: variant of   Mear  .

variants.name: Marucci
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Antonio, Silvio, Angelo, Carmela, Domenic, Donato, Egidio, Guido, Licinio, Lorenzo, Luciano.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Maruccio, a pet form of Mare or Mari .

variants.name: Marelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Giuseppe, Angelo, Dante.
Italian:
patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Mare  .

variants.name: Mear
meanings: English: variant of Mear , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: from Ó Meidhir ‘descendant of Meidhir’, a personal name based on meidhir ‘mirth’. Compare Myers .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de la Mare was born about 1130, in Yorkshire, England, his father, William de la Mare, was 28 and his mother, Amabel de Dicton, was 33. He married Cressie de Malherbe. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1203, in his hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de la Mare est né environ 1130, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William de la Mare, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Amabel de Dicton, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Cressie de Malherbe. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1203, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de la Mare um 1130 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de la Mare 28 und seine Mutter Amabel de Dicton 33. Er hat Cressie de Malherbe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1203 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de la Mare è nato il circa 1130 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William de la Mare, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Amabel de Dicton, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Cressie de Malherbe. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1203, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de la Mareが約1130年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de la Mareは28歳，母Amabel de Dictonは33歳であった。Cressie de Malherbeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1203年に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de la Mare(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de la Mare(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Amabel de Dicton(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Cressie de Malherbe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1203년 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1130–Abt 1203: tany ho any amin'ny 1130–tany ho any amin'ny 1203

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de la Mare nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de la Mare, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Amabel de Dicton, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Cressie de Malherbe. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1203, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de la Mare родился около 1130 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de la Mare было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Amabel de Dicton, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Cressie de Malherbe. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1203 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

sm.Abt 1130–Abt 1203: e tusa o le 1130–e tusa o le 1203

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de la Mare nació aproximadamente 1130, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de la Mare, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Amabel de Dicton, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Cressie de Malherbe. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1203, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
